description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The front facade includes a raised entryway accessed by a set of wide steps, flanked by low walls and small landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. The property includes a driveway with parking spaces and a garage, as well as a backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and outdoor seating area. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The landscaping is simple, with manicured grass, a few trees, and paved walkways surrounding the house. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing functionality and open outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a backyard pool. The design is minimalist with clean lines, landscaped greenery, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio, outdoor seating, and large windows.
description_view_2: Rear corner view with dense trees, pool, and a clear look at the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view showing the garage, driveway, and a tall windowless wall with trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entryway with wide steps, minimalistic door, low walls, and landscaped approach
